steps.title: Use the bar height
steps.content: The horizontal axis gives the charge amount, and the vertical axis gives the number of days. The question asks for the bar above $0\,\text{kWh}$.

steps.title: Read the zero-charge bar
steps.content: The bar for $0\,\text{kWh}$ has height $6$, so the battery received no charge on $6$ of the $15$ days. The answer is D.
